title: T-038 — UI: TEC-021 BOM Detail page with 7 tabs
prompt:
# T-038 — UI: TEC-021 BOM Detail page with 7 tabs

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §7.5, §7A TEC-083, §7A TEC-084
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:3-60` (bom_detail_page); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:63-152` (bom_ingredients_tree_tab); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206` (bom_cost_panel)

## Goal
BOM detail with 7 tabs (Ingredients Tree, Cost Panel, Routing, Process Params, Costs, Versions, Graph, Recipe Sheet).

Each tab is a Client/Server Component split. Versions tab links to T-040 diff view. Graph tab uses lightweight DAG renderer (e.g., reactflow) — keep behind dynamic import. Add release/bundle visibility: shared release badge, linked factory_spec release card, clone-on-write banner for released edits, RM usability summary panel, and NCR/review event hints for blocked components.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/boms/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/boms/[id]/_tabs/*.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-021-bom-detail.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- BOM edit modal (T-039)
- Version diff (T-040)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the BOM detail renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:3-60 and the seven tab components at lines 63-152, 154-206, 209-249, 252-307, 310-370, 373-468, 471-544, 551-603, then tab order, header, and primitives match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL counting tabs and asserting layout sections.
2. Given user clicks 'Versions' tab, when fired, then version timeline renders and includes a 'View diff' link per pair.
3. Given user lacks technical.bom.approve, when on Versions tab, then 'Approve' action is hidden.
4. Given BOM has co_products, when on Ingredients Tree tab, then they are rendered with byproduct flag.
5. Given BOM is released/approved, when user starts editing, then UI shows clone-on-write banner and routes to draft version creation rather than in-place edit.
6. Given paired factory_spec is not approved_for_factory/released, then BOM detail shows factory_spec blocker and factory-use action is disabled.
7. Given RM usability report has blockers, then Ingredients Tree tab shows blocker badges and remediation links from validateRmUsability.
8. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + tab order + RBAC.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-021-bom-detail.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not eager-load Graph tab.
- Do not collapse tabs into a single accordion.
- Do not show Approve/Release without paired factory_spec status.
- Do not keep FA/PR copy except legacy imported values.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:3-60` (bom_detail_page) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:63-152` (bom_ingredients_tree_tab) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206` (bom_cost_panel) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
